title: ASICS Men's GT-2000 9 Running Shoes
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System - Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.

FlyteFoam Midsole Technology - Our FlyteFoam technology provides exceptional bounce back and responsiveness no matter the distance, utilizing organic super fibers to help reduce packing out that traditionally happens with softer, low density foams.
DuoMax Support System - A dual density midsole system positioned to enhance support and stability, positioned sport specifically.
Guidance Line Midsole Technology - Vertical flex groove decouples the tooling along the line of progression for enhanced gait efficiency.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology - This Trusstic System Technology integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Not as good as the old ones!
reviews.text: Shoes fit as advertised, though toebox is slightly narrower than previous GT series. Footbed is comfy, but lacks the support of earlier GT models. These feel like $45 shoes, not $120 shoes. Disappointed in these.

title: Salomon Women's Speedcross 3 Trail Running Shoe
description: Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility.
features: 100% Synthetic/Fabric
Rubber sole
Heel measures approximately 1.75"
Anti-debris mesh protects the foot from dirt, twigs, and pebbles
Contra grip is designed for better traction and durability on mixed trails and complicated landscapes
Water resistance adds an extra layer of protection from the elements
Lightweight material maximizes comfort, fit, and breathability
Collar shape and sole hardness is specifically designed for a woman's foot

reviews.title: Perfect trail shoe!
reviews.text: Bought these for my wife. Her words are: "I love them"! She says she has wide feet and they still fit perfectly, she wore them all day for a 14 mile mud run/obstacle course and had a great experience with these shoes. Great traction in the mud!

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.text: Love these shoes! So comfortable and well made!

reviews.title: Wife loves them.
reviews.text: I purchased these shoes for my wife as a gift for our trail hiking and she absolutely loves them! Wears them all day now.

reviews.title: Fit great and look good too
reviews.text: I own more than one pair of these, as the fit and support work well for me. They cradle the foot, especially under the arch, and fit more narrowly than many other sneakers (which makes them just right for me). I get many compliments on the appearance, which is streamlined and not at all "clunky."

reviews.title: Awesome shoe, my third pair in ten years.
reviews.text: The best.  Super secure on trail, uneven surfaces, great looking and very comfortable.  I won't wear anything else!

title: Brooks Womens Glycerin 18 Running Shoe
description: A bit like running in the clouds. Thanks to the increased elasticity of the upper and the super-soft cushioning throughout the length, these men's running shoes are the ultimate comfort. Super soft cushioning. The revised ratio between midsole and outer sole allows you to increase LOFT DNA to achieve even more extreme softness at the sole of the foot, without losing reactivity or endurance. An OrthoLiteTM insole ensures an extraordinary wearing comfort.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin 18 is perfect for runners who think there's no such thing as too much cushioning. The upper enhances comfort by perfectly balancing stretch and structure.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides neutral support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Glycerin 17.

SUPER-SOFT CUSHIONING: Increased DNA LOFT super-soft cushioning allows for even more extreme softness, without losing responsiveness or durability, while the OrthoLite sockliner provides premium step-in comfort.
PLUSH FIT: The plush feel of an internal stretch bootie surrounds your foot and moves and expands with your stride. The engineered mesh upper enhances the fit.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: The plush transition zone makes every move from heel to toe feel incredibly soft and smooth.

reviews.title: Defective manufacturing

Very disappointed in it... it’s like the left shoe has a defect I it.  Unfortunately I saved the shoe for over a month before I wore it and too late to return.

reviews.title: Great support
reviews.text: These are very comfortable and supportive. I started wearing Brooks when I got planter fasciitis. I haven’t had issues in a long time. I tried another model, but I went back to these.

reviews.title: My Shoe!
reviews.text: These are the only shoes I have been wearing on a daily basis for over 10 years, Brooks Glycerin. My feet have seen many years of 12 hour shifts and are in sad shape. I have a dress pair, a pair I wear indoors, and several pairs for outdoors and yard work.  I can wear a man's 8 1/2 D or a Women's 9 1/2 wide and they fit perfectly.  If you need a cushioned shoe with good support these are the ones to buy.

reviews.title: Don't Buy!!
reviews.text: The shoes are NOT worth 130.00 or 50.00 inserts last less than one month shoes themselves no arch support. In the end caused my feet problems.

description:
High stability road running shoe, accomidates orthotics & overpronation
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.

title: Brooks Women's Ravenna 9 Road Running Shoe
description: Fall in love with the new Addiction 13. The BioMoGo DNA midsole provides adaptive cushioning, while the Extended Progressive Diagonal Rollbar guarantees stability and comfort. The Segmented Crash Pad allows a soft and flowing heel-toe transition. If you add to all this an extra-comfortable upper in perforated mesh for moisture transpiration, you will discover why these shoes are addictive, but without any unpleasant side effects. Features: The BioMoGo DNA midsole offers adaptive cushioning, the Crash Pad segmented along the entire length of the foot ensures smooth transitions, the Omega Flex Grooves improve flexibility, great for running on the road, ideal for those with medium arched feet / flat, ideal for those with moderate pronation, 12 mm thick midsole. reviews.title: Love these shoes
reviews.text: Very light weight and breathable. My favorite running shoes, I own several pair.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT SHOES RECOMMENDED BY PHYSICAL THERAPIST
reviews.text: I was recently diagnosed with Osteonecrosis and had to have a right total hip replacement due to collapsed hip socket.  My physical therapist recommended these for excellent support, mostly for my heel and ankle.  She was spot on.  Once the shoes were "broken in" they are wonderfully comfortable.  I did find them a bit tight across the top of my foot but gradually relaxed as I wore them.  I like that the tongues are also laced in.

reviews.title: Brooks is awesome yet again!
reviews.text: Love Brooks! My favorite running shows! They are consistently awesome no matter the model.

reviews.title: LOVE Brooks Tennies!!!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of Brooks and I’ll never buy anything else. They are SUPER comfy and SUPER durable. I have a history of Plantar Fasciitis (as many people who have worked 12-hr hosp shifts), and I’m EXTREMELY picky about my shoes. Brooks have EXCELLENT arch support. I require orthotics in most shoes that I wear, but not Brooks. I had my last pair for over 3 yrs of frequent wear. They are still structurally sound, but showing some cosmetic signs of wear. I bought this new pair for our 3-month trip in Europe. I have worn them for a week, and that is plenty to be assured that they are “broken in”. They are super comfy right out of the box!!

reviews.title: Great shoes for being in your feet. Lost a bit of cushion compared to previous versions.
reviews.text: I love Brooks and I’ve always worn Ravenna’s. I’m an ER nurse and I walk a lot, these are my go to work shoe. I wish there was a wee bit more arch support and I seem to feel they used to have more cushion overall, but an insert will make them perfect.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoe if you don't have flat feet!
reviews.text:
The amount of comfort in this shoe is amazing. It competes easily with $130 overpronation shoes I own aside from no arch support. That's where it failed completely for me. Already tried replacing the insoles with arch support ones but the comfort level wasn't the same sadly. The provided insole is removable but is tacked down with adhesive. Didn't damage the shoes when removing it and with care I was able to put it back in.

So in conclusion, yes these are amazing shoes if you need some overpronation support or if your gait is neutral. In this case I'd highly recommend but sadly it didn't work for me. The shoes look amazing and they feel amazing. The price with the construction of the shoes is an amazing value if you just need some extra support and cushion. I'd consider this shoe to be plush in the midsole and the insole was comfortable but not a lot to make it heavy. If it weren't for my arch I would of ordered another shoe to keep in storage when this one wears out. Great service as usual from Amazon for the free return.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT

title: New Balance Kid's 519 V2 Alternative Closure Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 519v2 kids' performance shoe is made with a versatile upper and a signature REVlite midsole to form a classic shoe that's comfortable, durable and pairs effortlessly with all of your kid's go-to gear. This pair of running shoes for kids is designed with no-sew overlays to help ensure a top-notch fit and a sleek feel that's perfect for all-day, any-day wear. The synthetic and mesh construction offers breathability and a proper fit, so your little one can tackle whatever their day throws at them, from recess shenanigans with friends to after-school practice. Best of all is the cool style of these cushioned running shoes for kids. Fun, playful colors and eye-catching patterns make for a pair of sneakers that fashion-conscious youngsters will love.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 28 Running Shoes
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole
Engineered mesh upper improves breathability:
OrthoLite X-55 sockliner: Improves comfort
AHAR Plus Outsole: Strategically positioned in critical areas of the outsole, this exceptionally durable compound is 50% more durable than standard ASICS High Abrasion Rubber.
Trusstic System technology: Reduces the weight of the sole unit while retaining the structural integrity of the shoe.
Redesigned external heel counter helps keep the foot stable and provide a more comfortable stride:

reviews.title: Total best!
reviews.text: That this is my fourth in a row kayano 28 oughta tell ya something!!!

reviews.title: Asics has changed
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics Gel Kayano running shoes  for many years.  This is the first time I have had a complaint.  They are no sized correctly.  Every time I wear them my back hurts.  When I put them up against the pair I am replacing the new ones are not the same size.  I missed the return period because I kept thinking they would be okay.  As it is I have 2 pair of shoes that I spent over $200 on and cannot wear them.

reviews.title: Great for wide and flat feet
reviews.text: Got these for my son who has a wide/flat foot. He said these are so comfortable. He’s on his feet for most of the day and said his back pain has decreased since wearing these too.

reviews.title: Comfy
reviews.text: I like the additional loops that help keep the tongue from sliding over my narrow feet. Excellent cushion.

reviews.title: GREAT FIT
reviews.text: Just what I was looking for

title: La Sportiva Mens Jackal Trail Running Shoes
features: Rubber sole
A long-distance trail running shoe for men that offers exceptional cushioning and a wider fit to tackle any off-road adventure
Lightweight and highly durable, the nearly seamless upper keeps you cool and dry while providing reducing hot spots. Sculpted tongue design for an ergonomic fit.
A wider fitting shoe with higher volume to accommodate foot swelling as you put on more miles. 7mm Drop (Stack: Heel: 29mm / Toe: 22mm)

FriXion AT 2.0 rubber outsole with 3 mm lugs for durable, confident grip. Flex-Grooves in the outsole facilitate the perfect flex while dual density rock guard throughout the shoe for ultimate underfoot protection
Rear pull tab assist in fast on/off. Rubber toe cap for rock protection.

reviews.title: Fit too small and too wide.
reviews.text: The shape of the toe box is designed for wider feet with short toes. Add at least a full size over what your usual wear.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Kenun Lyte MX Running Shoes
description: Cloud-like comfort meets street-forward style in the ultra-lightweight GEL-Kenun Lyte MX. Fusing the fluid lines of the GEL-Kenun series with seat-belt buckle design inspiration, this cushioned silhouette delivers a secure, supportive fit that works with your natural gait to guide efficient strides all day long. Borrowing from the iconic GEL-LYTE III, a split tongue and plush collar make for an easy-on, easy-off trait that doubles as a style-focused detail. Weight: 6.4. Heel Height: 22. Forefoot Height: 12.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole

reviews.title: Okay for casual, not a whole lot of support though
reviews.text: Cute shoe but not ideal for being on your feet for hours. I work 12 hour shifts and my heels were killing me the first 12 hour shift I worked in them. If comfort and stability is what you’re going for, I’d go with a different ASICS shoe. I wouldn’t ever run in them and I’m looking for inserts/a new work shoe but I’ll still wear them casually

title: Kricely Men's Trail Running Shoes Fashion Walking Hiking Sneakers for Men Tennis Cross Training Shoe Outdoor Snearker Mens Casual Workout Footwear
features: Imported
Rubber sole

Lightweight and Flexible:Fashionable and stylish men’s trail running shoes,made of high quality materials,low-top sneakers,with traditional lace-up design,it is suitable for outdoor sport and causal wear.
Breathable and Comfortable:Cross training shoes for men, the upper material is TPU+Knitted Mesh,very breathable,it can make your feet comfortable all the time.

Great Grip and Absorb Shock: Mens Athletic Sport Shoes with X-GRIP Sole,stability upgrade.It is non-slip and wear-resistant,has a strong grip,the dual 3Ds matte TPU design provides stable support and the best shock absorption effect for sports,making you more comfortable when running.

Fashion and Reflective Design:Men’s fashion sneakers has multiple colors,classic black and fashion fluorescent green and red,unique gradient gray and blue,it shows different vitality. Reflective design to increase recognition,and reflective strip at the back has strong support.Let you run free and swiftly,sport with a different attitude.

Occasion:Men's trail road running shoes are suitable for all kinds of sports and daily wear,such as city running,hiking,walking,daily wear, leisure, jogging, tennis, cycling, gym, training,camping,travel,regular day exercise,indoor,and other outdoor multifunctional sports.

reviews.text: Prevented foot pain. Used in Yosemite. Great feel. Great look. Perfect walking/hiking shoe.

title: adidas Women's Response Super 2.0 Running Shoe
description: Activity never takes a day off. These women's adidas running shoes have an Adibouncy sockliner and a Boost midsole for elevated cushioning and energy return. A TPU heel piece provides extra stability.
features: 100% Textile Synthetics
Rubber sole
Women's running shoes with cushioning and stability for everyday runs
Regular fit; Rubber outsole for grip
Textile upper with molded TPU heel piece for flexibility with a stable heel
Adibouncy EVA sockliner provides cushioning; Boost midsole for responsive energy return
This product is made with Primegreen, a series of high-performance recycled materials. 50% of the upper is recycled content. No virgin polyester.

reviews.title: Perfectos
reviews.text: Excelente regalo para mi pareja

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: These are really nice shoes and I’m glad I bought them. I get compliments ALL of the time on how nice they look, they stay clean too. I’m really surprised on how much I liked them, I had never owned any shoes by Adidas but I will continue to buy shoes from them if they’re this nice. I’m on my feet 12-13 hours a day working in healthcare I use profoot insoles with them and it gets the job done.

reviews.title: For a my teenage daughter
reviews.text: I bought this for my middle schooler daughter for school, but she use them all the time. They're comfortable, they look the same as the picture. I bought them about a month ago. I recommend them.

reviews.title: Sizing
reviews.text: I absolutely love these shoes! They run about a half of a size too big. I normally wear an 8.5,which is what I ordered. But these are definitely not an 8.5,more like a 9. The width of the 8.5 is good, if you have wider feet. Not sure how a correct size would fit the width. All around pretty good shoe for the money.
